attributes.description: Single node deep dive with memory decomposition, working set utilization, network I/O, and eviction risk thresholds.

query.esql:
FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.name != ""
| STATS last_seen = MAX(@timestamp) BY k8s.node.name
| INLINE STATS latest_ts = MAX(last_seen)
| WHERE DATE_DIFF("minute", last_seen, latest_ts) <= 5
| STATS count = COUNT(*), names = VALUES(k8s.node.name)
| EVAL name = CASE(count == 1, MV_FIRST(names), CONCAT(TO_STRING(count), " nodes"))
| KEEP name

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.name != ""
| STATS last_seen = MAX(@timestamp) BY k8s.node.name
| INLINE STATS latest_ts = MAX(last_seen)
| WHERE DATE_DIFF("minute", last_seen, latest_ts) <= 5
| STATS count = COUNT(*), names = VALUES(k8s.node.name)
| EVAL name = CASE(count == 1, MV_FIRST(names), CONCAT(TO_STRING(count), " nodes"))
| KEEP name

embeddableConfig.description: Node name for the selected drilldown target.

query.esql:
FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.node.condition_ready IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.name != ""
| STATS ready = LAST(k8s.node.condition_ready, @timestamp),
    last_seen = MAX(@timestamp)
  BY k8s.node.name
| INLINE STATS latest_ts = MAX(last_seen)
| WHERE DATE_DIFF("minute", last_seen, latest_ts) <= 5
| STATS count = COUNT(*), ready = MAX(ready)
| EVAL ready = CASE(
    count > 1, "N/A",
    ready == 1, "Ready",
    "Not Ready"
  )
| KEEP ready

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.node.condition_ready IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.name != ""
| STATS ready = LAST(k8s.node.condition_ready, @timestamp),
    last_seen = MAX(@timestamp)
  BY k8s.node.name
| INLINE STATS latest_ts = MAX(last_seen)
| WHERE DATE_DIFF("minute", last_seen, latest_ts) <= 5
| STATS count = COUNT(*), ready = MAX(ready)
| EVAL ready = CASE(
    count > 1, "N/A",
    ready == 1, "Ready",
    "Not Ready"
  )
| KEEP ready

attributes.description: Node condition for the selected node, based on the latest collected data for the selected time range. Not Ready should be investigated.

embeddableConfig.description: Node condition for the selected node, based on the latest collected data for the selected time range. Not Ready should be investigated.

query.esql:
FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.name != ""
| KEEP k8s.node.name
| LIMIT 1

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.name != ""
| KEEP k8s.node.name
| LIMIT 1

embeddableConfig.description: Shortcut to open Discover for logs related to this node.

query.esql:
FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.allocatable_cpu IS NOT NULL
| STATS allocatable_cpu = LAST(k8s.node.allocatable_cpu, @timestamp),
    last_seen = MAX(@timestamp)
  BY k8s.node.name
| INLINE STATS latest_ts = MAX(last_seen)
| WHERE DATE_DIFF("minute", last_seen, latest_ts) <= 5
| STATS total_cpu = SUM(allocatable_cpu)

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.allocatable_cpu IS NOT NULL
| STATS allocatable_cpu = LAST(k8s.node.allocatable_cpu, @timestamp),
    last_seen = MAX(@timestamp)
  BY k8s.node.name
| INLINE STATS latest_ts = MAX(last_seen)
| WHERE DATE_DIFF("minute", last_seen, latest_ts) <= 5
| STATS total_cpu = SUM(allocatable_cpu)

embeddableConfig.description: Total allocatable CPU for this node, based on the latest collected data for the selected time range.

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL

| STATS allocatable_memory = LAST(k8s.node.allocatable_memory, @timestamp),
    last_seen = MAX(@timestamp)
  BY k8s.node.name

| STATS total_memory = SUM(allocatable_memory)

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.allocatable_memory IS NOT NULL
| STATS allocatable_memory = LAST(k8s.node.allocatable_memory, @timestamp),

query.esql:
TS metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*, metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.name != ""
| STATS avg_usage = AVG(k8s.node.cpu.usage),
    avg_alloc = AVG(k8s.node.allocatable_cpu)
  BY timestamp = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| EVAL bucket_util = CASE(avg_alloc > 0, avg_usage / avg_alloc, NULL)
| SORT timestamp
| STATS cpu_util = ROUND(AVG(avg_usage) / AVG(avg_alloc), 4),
    cpu_util_last = ROUND(LAST(bucket_util, timestamp), 4)
| EVAL max_val = 1.0
| KEEP cpu_util, cpu_util_last, max_val

TS metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*, metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.name != ""
| STATS avg_usage = AVG(k8s.node.cpu.usage),
    avg_alloc = AVG(k8s.node.allocatable_cpu)
  BY timestamp = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| EVAL bucket_util = CASE(avg_alloc > 0, avg_usage / avg_alloc, NULL)
| SORT timestamp
| STATS cpu_util = ROUND(AVG(avg_usage) / AVG(avg_alloc), 4),
    cpu_util_last = ROUND(LAST(bucket_util, timestamp), 4)
| EVAL max_val = 1.0
| KEEP cpu_util, cpu_util_last, max_val

embeddableConfig.description: Average node CPU utilization for the selected time range. "Last value vs Avg" compares the latest bucket to that average. Values near 100% can indicate CPU saturation.

query.esql:
FROM metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.name != ""
  AND k8s.node.filesystem.usage IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.filesystem.capacity IS NOT NULL
| STATS avg_usage = AVG(k8s.node.filesystem.usage),
    avg_cap = AVG(k8s.node.filesystem.capacity)
  BY timestamp = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| EVAL bucket_util = CASE(avg_cap > 0, TO_DOUBLE(avg_usage) / TO_DOUBLE(avg_cap), NULL)
| SORT timestamp
| STATS disk_util = ROUND(AVG(avg_usage) / AVG(avg_cap), 4),
    disk_util_last = ROUND(LAST(bucket_util, timestamp), 4)
| EVAL max_val = 1.0
| KEEP disk_util, disk_util_last, max_val

FROM metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.name != ""
  AND k8s.node.filesystem.usage IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.filesystem.capacity IS NOT NULL
| STATS avg_usage = AVG(k8s.node.filesystem.usage),
    avg_cap = AVG(k8s.node.filesystem.capacity)
  BY timestamp = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| EVAL bucket_util = CASE(avg_cap > 0, TO_DOUBLE(avg_usage) / TO_DOUBLE(avg_cap), NULL)
| SORT timestamp
| STATS disk_util = ROUND(AVG(avg_usage) / AVG(avg_cap), 4),
    disk_util_last = ROUND(LAST(bucket_util, timestamp), 4)
| EVAL max_val = 1.0
| KEEP disk_util, disk_util_last, max_val

embeddableConfig.description: Average node disk utilization for the selected time range. "Last value vs Avg" compares the latest bucket to that average. Values near 100% can indicate disk pressure.

query.esql:
TS metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*, metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.name != ""
| STATS avg_ws = AVG(k8s.node.memory.working_set),
    avg_alloc = AVG(k8s.node.allocatable_memory)
  BY timestamp = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| EVAL bucket_util = CASE(avg_alloc > 0, avg_ws / avg_alloc, NULL)
| SORT timestamp
| STATS mem_util = ROUND(AVG(avg_ws) / AVG(avg_alloc), 4),
    mem_util_last = ROUND(LAST(bucket_util, timestamp), 4)
| EVAL max_val = 1.0
| KEEP mem_util, mem_util_last, max_val

TS metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*, metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.name != ""
| STATS avg_ws = AVG(k8s.node.memory.working_set),
    avg_alloc = AVG(k8s.node.allocatable_memory)
  BY timestamp = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| EVAL bucket_util = CASE(avg_alloc > 0, avg_ws / avg_alloc, NULL)
| SORT timestamp
| STATS mem_util = ROUND(AVG(avg_ws) / AVG(avg_alloc), 4),
    mem_util_last = ROUND(LAST(bucket_util, timestamp), 4)
| EVAL max_val = 1.0
| KEEP mem_util, mem_util_last, max_val

embeddableConfig.description: Average node memory working set utilization for the selected time range. "Last value vs Avg" compares the latest bucket to that average. Values near 100% can indicate memory pressure.

query.esql:
FROM metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*, metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
  | WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
    AND (k8s.node.memory.working_set IS NOT NULL OR k8s.node.allocatable_memory IS NOT NULL)
  | STATS mem_used = MAX(k8s.node.memory.working_set), alloc_mem = MAX(k8s.node.allocatable_memory)
    BY @timestamp = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT @timestamp
  | KEEP @timestamp, mem_used, alloc_mem

FROM metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*, metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
  | WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
    AND (k8s.node.memory.working_set IS NOT NULL OR k8s.node.allocatable_memory IS NOT NULL)
  | STATS mem_used = MAX(k8s.node.memory.working_set), alloc_mem = MAX(k8s.node.allocatable_memory)
    BY @timestamp = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT @timestamp
  | KEEP @timestamp, mem_used, alloc_mem

embeddableConfig.description: Shows node memory working set compared with allocatable memory over time. Watch for working set approaching allocatable memory.
embeddableConfig.title: Memory working set vs allocatable

query.esql:
FROM metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*, metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
  | WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
    AND (k8s.node.cpu.usage IS NOT NULL OR k8s.node.allocatable_cpu IS NOT NULL)
  | STATS cpu_used = MAX(k8s.node.cpu.usage), alloc_cpu = MAX(k8s.node.allocatable_cpu)
    BY @timestamp = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT @timestamp
  | KEEP @timestamp, cpu_used, alloc_cpu

    BY @timestamp = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT @timestamp
  | KEEP @timestamp, cpu_used, alloc_cpu

embeddableConfig.description: Shows node CPU usage compared with allocatable CPU over time. Watch for CPU usage approaching allocatable CPU.
embeddableConfig.title: CPU usage vs allocatable

query.esql:
FROM metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*
  | WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
    AND k8s.node.filesystem.usage IS NOT NULL AND k8s.node.filesystem.capacity IS NOT NULL
  | STATS disk_used = MAX(k8s.node.filesystem.usage), disk_cap = MAX(k8s.node.filesystem.capacity)
    BY @timestamp = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT @timestamp
  | KEEP @timestamp, disk_used, disk_cap

FROM metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*
  | WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
    AND k8s.node.filesystem.usage IS NOT NULL AND k8s.node.filesystem.capacity IS NOT NULL
  | STATS disk_used = MAX(k8s.node.filesystem.usage), disk_cap = MAX(k8s.node.filesystem.capacity)
    BY @timestamp = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT @timestamp
  | KEEP @timestamp, disk_used, disk_cap

embeddableConfig.description: Shows node disk usage compared with capacity over time. Watch for disk usage approaching capacity.
embeddableConfig.title: Disk usage vs capacity

query.esql:
FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
  | WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL AND k8s.node.name != ""
    AND k8s.pod.uid IS NOT NULL
  | STATS last_seen = MAX(@timestamp)
    BY k8s.pod.uid, @timestamp = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
  | STATS pod_count = COUNT(*) BY @timestamp
| SORT @timestamp
  | KEEP @timestamp, pod_count

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
  | WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL AND k8s.node.name != ""
    AND k8s.pod.uid IS NOT NULL
  | STATS last_seen = MAX(@timestamp)
    BY k8s.pod.uid, @timestamp = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
  | STATS pod_count = COUNT(*) BY @timestamp
| SORT @timestamp
  | KEEP @timestamp, pod_count

embeddableConfig.description: Shows pod count on this node over time. Sudden drops or spikes can indicate scheduling changes or node churn.
embeddableConfig.title: Pod count over time

query.esql:
TS metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.memory.working_set IS NOT NULL
| STATS
    rss = SUM(k8s.node.memory.rss),
    working_set = SUM(k8s.node.memory.working_set),
    available = SUM(k8s.node.memory.available)
  BY timestamp = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT timestamp
| KEEP timestamp, rss, working_set, available

TS metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.memory.working_set IS NOT NULL
| STATS
    rss = SUM(k8s.node.memory.rss),
    working_set = SUM(k8s.node.memory.working_set),
    available = SUM(k8s.node.memory.available)
  BY timestamp = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT timestamp
| KEEP timestamp, rss, working_set, available

embeddableConfig.description: Shows node memory composition over time: RSS, working set, and available memory. Watch for low available memory or rising working set.
embeddableConfig.title: Memory composition

query.esql:
TS metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.network.io IS NOT NULL
| STATS
    network_bytes = SUM(RATE(k8s.node.network.io))
  BY timestamp = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend), direction
| EVAL direction = CASE(direction == "receive", "Network In", direction == "transmit", "Network Out", direction)
| SORT timestamp
| KEEP timestamp, direction, network_bytes

TS metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.network.io IS NOT NULL
| STATS
    network_bytes = SUM(RATE(k8s.node.network.io))
  BY timestamp = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend), direction
| EVAL direction = CASE(direction == "receive", "Network In", direction == "transmit", "Network Out", direction)
| SORT timestamp
| KEEP timestamp, direction, network_bytes

embeddableConfig.description: Shows node network throughput in and out over time. Watch for unexpected spikes or sustained high throughput.

query.esql:
FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL AND k8s.node.name != ""
  AND k8s.pod.uid IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.pod.phase IS NOT NULL
| STATS phase = LAST(k8s.pod.phase, @timestamp),
    last_seen = MAX(@timestamp)
  BY k8s.pod.uid
| INLINE STATS latest_ts = MAX(last_seen)
| WHERE DATE_DIFF("minute", last_seen, latest_ts) <= 5
  AND phase == 2
| STATS count = COUNT(*)

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL AND k8s.node.name != ""
  AND k8s.pod.uid IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.pod.phase IS NOT NULL
| STATS phase = LAST(k8s.pod.phase, @timestamp),
    last_seen = MAX(@timestamp)
  BY k8s.pod.uid
| INLINE STATS latest_ts = MAX(last_seen)
| WHERE DATE_DIFF("minute", last_seen, latest_ts) <= 5
  AND phase == 2
| STATS count = COUNT(*)

embeddableConfig.description: Number of pods on this node in Running phase, based on the latest pod phase per pod in the selected time range.

query.esql:
FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL AND k8s.node.name != ""
  AND k8s.pod.uid IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.pod.phase IS NOT NULL
| STATS phase = LAST(k8s.pod.phase, @timestamp),

  BY k8s.pod.uid
| INLINE STATS latest_ts = MAX(last_seen)
| WHERE DATE_DIFF("minute", last_seen, latest_ts) <= 5

| INLINE STATS latest_ts = MAX(last_seen)
| WHERE DATE_DIFF("minute", last_seen, latest_ts) <= 5

embeddableConfig.description: Number of pods on this node in Pending phase, based on the latest pod phase per pod in the selected time range. Non-zero values can indicate scheduling or image pull issues.

query.esql:
FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL AND k8s.node.name != ""

| INLINE STATS latest_ts = MAX(last_seen)

| INLINE STATS latest_ts = MAX(last_seen)

embeddableConfig.description: Number of pods on this node in Failed phase, based on the latest pod phase per pod in the selected time range. Non-zero values should be investigated.

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL AND k8s.node.name != ""
  AND k8s.pod.uid IS NOT NULL

| WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL AND k8s.node.name != ""
  AND k8s.pod.uid IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.pod.phase IS NOT NULL
| STATS phase = LAST(k8s.pod.phase, @timestamp),

  BY k8s.pod.uid
| INLINE STATS latest_ts = MAX(last_seen)
| WHERE DATE_DIFF("minute", last_seen, latest_ts) <= 5

query.esql:
FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL AND k8s.node.name != ""
  AND k8s.pod.uid IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.pod.phase IS NOT NULL
| STATS phase = LAST(k8s.pod.phase, @timestamp),
    last_seen = MAX(@timestamp)
  BY k8s.pod.uid
| INLINE STATS latest_ts = MAX(last_seen)
| WHERE DATE_DIFF("minute", last_seen, latest_ts) <= 5
  AND phase != 1 AND phase != 2 AND phase != 3 AND phase != 4
| STATS count = COUNT(*)

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL AND k8s.node.name != ""
  AND k8s.pod.uid IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.pod.phase IS NOT NULL
| STATS phase = LAST(k8s.pod.phase, @timestamp),
    last_seen = MAX(@timestamp)
  BY k8s.pod.uid
| INLINE STATS latest_ts = MAX(last_seen)
| WHERE DATE_DIFF("minute", last_seen, latest_ts) <= 5
  AND phase != 1 AND phase != 2 AND phase != 3 AND phase != 4
| STATS count = COUNT(*)

embeddableConfig.description: Number of pods on this node with an unknown phase, based on the latest pod phase per pod in the selected time range. Non-zero values should be investigated.

query.esql:
FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL AND k8s.node.name != ""
  AND k8s.pod.uid IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.pod.phase IS NOT NULL
| STATS phase = LAST(k8s.pod.phase, @timestamp),
    last_seen = MAX(@timestamp)
  BY k8s.pod.uid
| INLINE STATS latest_ts = MAX(last_seen)
| WHERE DATE_DIFF("minute", last_seen, latest_ts) <= 5
| STATS count = COUNT(*)

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL AND k8s.node.name != ""
  AND k8s.pod.uid IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.pod.phase IS NOT NULL
| STATS phase = LAST(k8s.pod.phase, @timestamp),
    last_seen = MAX(@timestamp)
  BY k8s.pod.uid
| INLINE STATS latest_ts = MAX(last_seen)
| WHERE DATE_DIFF("minute", last_seen, latest_ts) <= 5
| STATS count = COUNT(*)

embeddableConfig.description: Total number of pods on this node, based on the latest pod phase per pod in the selected time range.

query.esql:
FROM metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*, metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
    | WHERE k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL AND k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL AND k8s.node.name != ""
  | STATS
      phase_num = LAST(k8s.pod.phase, CASE(k8s.pod.phase IS NOT NULL, @timestamp, NULL)),
      container_restarts = MAX(k8s.container.restarts),
      cpu_usage = AVG(k8s.pod.cpu.usage),
      mem_ws = AVG(k8s.pod.memory.working_set),
      last_seen = MAX(@timestamp)
    BY k8s.pod.uid, k8s.pod.name, k8s.namespace.name, k8s.container.name
  | STATS
      phase_num = MAX(phase_num),
      containers = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.container.name),
      restarts = SUM(container_restarts),
      cpu_usage = AVG(cpu_usage),
      mem_ws = AVG(mem_ws),
      last_seen = MAX(last_seen)
    BY k8s.pod.uid, k8s.pod.name, k8s.namespace.name
  | INLINE STATS latest_ts = MAX(last_seen)
  | WHERE DATE_DIFF("minute", last_seen, latest_ts) <= 5
  | EVAL restarts = COALESCE(restarts, TO_LONG(0)),
    phase = CASE(
      phase_num == 1, "Pending",
      phase_num == 2, "Running",
      phase_num == 3, "Succeeded",
      phase_num == 4, "Failed",
      phase_num == 5, "Unknown",
      "N/A"
    )
  | KEEP k8s.pod.name, k8s.namespace.name, phase, containers, restarts, cpu_usage, mem_ws
  | SORT restarts DESC, k8s.pod.name ASC

FROM metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*, metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
    | WHERE k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL AND k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL AND k8s.node.name != ""
  | STATS
      phase_num = LAST(k8s.pod.phase, CASE(k8s.pod.phase IS NOT NULL, @timestamp, NULL)),
      container_restarts = MAX(k8s.container.restarts),
      cpu_usage = AVG(k8s.pod.cpu.usage),
      mem_ws = AVG(k8s.pod.memory.working_set),
      last_seen = MAX(@timestamp)
    BY k8s.pod.uid, k8s.pod.name, k8s.namespace.name, k8s.container.name
  | STATS
      phase_num = MAX(phase_num),
      containers = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.container.name),
      restarts = SUM(container_restarts),
      cpu_usage = AVG(cpu_usage),
      mem_ws = AVG(mem_ws),
      last_seen = MAX(last_seen)
    BY k8s.pod.uid, k8s.pod.name, k8s.namespace.name
  | INLINE STATS latest_ts = MAX(last_seen)
  | WHERE DATE_DIFF("minute", last_seen, latest_ts) <= 5
  | EVAL restarts = COALESCE(restarts, TO_LONG(0)),
    phase = CASE(
      phase_num == 1, "Pending",
      phase_num == 2, "Running",
      phase_num == 3, "Succeeded",
      phase_num == 4, "Failed",
      phase_num == 5, "Unknown",
      "N/A"
    )
  | KEEP k8s.pod.name, k8s.namespace.name, phase, containers, restarts, cpu_usage, mem_ws
  | SORT restarts DESC, k8s.pod.name ASC

embeddableConfig.description: Pods on this node, ranked by container restarts (highest first). Click a pod name to drill into pod details, or a namespace to drill into namespace details. Container restarts, phase and container counts reflect the latest collected values. Avg CPU utilization and avg memory working set are averaged over the selected time range.
embeddableConfig.title: Pods

attributes.title: [Kubernetes OTel] Node Detail
